tools.name: projects.cloudschedulerProjectsLocationsJobsPatch
tools.description: Updates a job. If successful, the updated Job is returned. If the job does not exist, `NOT_FOUND` is returned. If UpdateJob does not successfully return, it is possible for the job to be in an Job.State.UPDATE_FAILED state. A job in this state may not be executed. If this happens, retry the UpdateJob request until a successful response is received.

tools.name: projects.cloudschedulerProjectsLocationsJobsPause
tools.description: Pauses a job. If a job is paused then the system will stop executing the job until it is re-enabled via ResumeJob. The state of the job is stored in state; if paused it will be set to Job.State.PAUSED. A job must be in Job.State.ENABLED to be paused.

tools.name: projects.cloudschedulerProjectsLocationsJobsResume
tools.description: Resume a job. This method reenables a job after it has been Job.State.PAUSED. The state of a job is stored in Job.state; after calling this method it will be set to Job.State.ENABLED. A job must be in Job.State.PAUSED to be resumed.

tools.name: projects.cloudschedulerProjectsLocationsJobsRun
tools.description: Forces a job to run now. When this method is called, Cloud Scheduler will dispatch the job, even if the job is already running.

tools.name: projects.cloudschedulerProjectsLocationsList
tools.description: Lists information about the supported locations for this service.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
